name: ruby-webrick
title: ruby-webrick
description:
HTTP server toolkit in Ruby
WEBrick is an HTTP server toolkit that can be configured as an HTTPS server, a
proxy server, and a virtual-host server.
.
It used to be provided with the standard library of the Ruby interpreter, and
has been available only as a standalone gem since ruby3.0.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-webrick because HTTP server toolkit in Ruby.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-webrick as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-webrick with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-webrick --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
